01_plumber_voice_agent.name: Plumber Voice Agent - Lead Capture
01_plumber_voice_agent.description: Captures emergency plumbing calls via voice, saves leads, alerts team
01_plumber_voice_agent.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives webhook with caller details (name, phone, issue, urgency, address) 2) Initiates Retell AI voice call to customer 3) Saves lead to Supabase 'leads' table 4) Sends Slack notification to team channel

02_dental_appointment.name: Dental Clinic - Appointment Booking
02_dental_appointment.description: Books dental appointments via Cal.com, sends SMS confirmation
02_dental_appointment.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives patient booking request 2) Creates appointment via Cal.com API 3) Saves to Supabase 'appointments' table 4) Sends Twilio SMS confirmation to patient

expected_output.confirmation_message: Hi Sarah, your appointment is confirmed for May 25 at 10:00 AM

03_real_estate_lead.name: Real Estate - Lead Qualification
03_real_estate_lead.description: Scores and qualifies real estate leads by budget and timeline
03_real_estate_lead.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives lead data (name, phone, budget, property type, timeline) 2) Calculates lead score (0-100) based on budget range, timeline urgency, pre-approval status 3) Assigns priority (hot/warm/cold) 4) Saves to CRM 5) Syncs to Zapier for agent notification

04_restaurant_whatsapp.name: Restaurant - WhatsApp Order Bot
04_restaurant_whatsapp.description: Takes food orders via WhatsApp, confirms with customer
04_restaurant_whatsapp.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives order via WhatsApp webhook 2) Parses order items and calculates total 3) Saves to Supabase 'orders' table 4) Sends WhatsApp confirmation with order ID and estimated time

expected_output.confirmation: Hi Lisa, your order ORD-ABC123 has been received! Total: $38.97. We'll prepare it shortly.

05_hvac_emergency.name: HVAC - Emergency Dispatch
05_hvac_emergency.description: Classifies HVAC issues, dispatches technician for emergencies
05_hvac_emergency.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives service request 2) Classifies as emergency if temp >95F, <50F, or contains 'emergency' keyword 3) If emergency: calls technician via Twilio, alerts Slack 4) Always saves ticket to database

test_input.issue_type: AC not working, house is 98 degrees

06_cleaning_quote.name: Cleaning Service - Quote Calculator
06_cleaning_quote.description: Calculates cleaning quotes based on sqft, rooms, extras
06_cleaning_quote.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives cleaning request details 2) Calculates price: sqft x $0.15 + bedrooms x $25 + bathrooms x $35 + service multiplier + extras 3) Generates quote ID 4) Saves to database 5) Emails quote to customer via Resend

07_fitness_followup.name: Fitness Coach - Client Follow-Up
07_fitness_followup.description: Tracks workout gaps, sends personalized follow-up messages
07_fitness_followup.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives client check-in data 2) Calculates days since last workout 3) If >=7 days: high priority SMS 4) If 3-7 days: medium priority email 5) If <3 days: update record only 6) Generates personalized message based on client's goal

expected_output.message: Hey James, we miss you! It's been 10 days. Your muscles are waiting - let's crush that muscle gain goal!

08_content_repurposing.name: Content Repurposing - Blog to Social
08_content_repurposing.description: Turns one blog post into multiple social media formats
08_content_repurposing.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives blog URL and content 2) Uses Gemini AI to generate: Twitter thread (5 tweets), LinkedIn post, Instagram caption with hashtags, TikTok script 3) Saves all formats to database 4) All from same source content

test_input.blog_title: The Complete AI Automation Guide for 2026
test_input.blog_content: AI automation is transforming how businesses operate...

09_lead_magnet.name: Lead Magnet Generator
09_lead_magnet.description: Creates PDF-ready content from any topic using AI
09_lead_magnet.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives topic, industry, target audience, magnet type (checklist/guide/ebook), page count 2) Uses Gemini to generate full structured content with title, intro, sections, CTA 3) Calculates word count 4) Saves to database for PDF conversion

10_meeting_summarizer.name: Meeting Summarizer
10_meeting_summarizer.description: Extracts decisions, action items, sentiment from meeting notes
10_meeting_summarizer.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives meeting title, notes, attendees 2) Uses Gemini to extract: executive summary, key decisions, action items (with owners/deadlines), follow-up questions, sentiment analysis 3) Saves to database 4) Emails structured summary to team

test_input.meeting_notes: We discussed the new AI feature... Alice will handle the API integration. Bob will design the UI. Deadline is June 15...

11_cold_email.name: Cold Email Personalizer
11_cold_email.description: Writes hyper-personalized cold emails from LinkedIn data
11_cold_email.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives prospect data (name, title, company, recent LinkedIn post) 2) Uses Gemini to write personalized cold email referencing their content 3) Generates subject line, body, personalization hook 4) Saves draft to database for review

test_input.recent_post: Just scaled our API to handle 10M requests/day. Teamwork makes it happen!

expected_output.subject: Congrats on 10M requests/day - quick question
expected_output.body: Hi Jennifer, saw your post about scaling to 10M requests...

12_support_ticket.name: Support Ticket Router
12_support_ticket.description: AI classifies tickets, auto-resolves simple ones
12_support_ticket.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives support ticket (customer, subject, message) 2) Uses Gemini to classify: category, priority, sentiment, suggested response, assignee 3) If auto_resolve=true: sends AI-generated response to customer 4) Saves ticket to database with classification

test_input.subject: How do I reset my password?
test_input.message: I forgot my password and the reset email is not coming through. Can you help?

expected_output.suggested_response: Hi Tom, sorry for the trouble...

13_price_monitor.name: Competitor Price Monitor
13_price_monitor.description: Scrapes competitor prices, AI analyzes trends, alerts on changes
13_price_monitor.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Runs every 6 hours via schedule trigger 2) Scrapes competitor product page via ScraperAPI 3) Extracts current price 4) Uses Gemini to analyze trend and recommend action 5) Saves to database 6) Alerts Slack if significant change detected

14_resume_screening.name: AI Resume Screening
14_resume_screening.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives candidate resume and job requirements 2) Uses Gemini to score match (0-100), identify matched/missing skills, estimate experience 3) Generates 3 tailored interview questions 4) Auto-emails candidate with verdict

test_input.job_description: Looking for React, Node, TypeScript, 5+ years experience...
test_input.resume_text: 6 years experience. Expert in React, Node.js, TypeScript. Built 3 production apps...

interview_questions: Tell me about scaling your React app to 10K users
How do you handle TypeScript strict mode in large projects?
Describe your experience with AWS deployment

15_social_responder.name: Social Comment Responder
15_social_responder.description: Auto-generates on-brand replies to social media comments
15_social_responder.prompt: Create an n8n workflow that: 1) Receives social media comment (platform, commenter, text, brand voice) 2) Uses Gemini to generate reply matching brand voice 3) Detects sentiment 4) Includes subtle CTA if natural 5) Saves reply for review before posting

test_input.comment_text: This looks amazing! Is there a discount code for first-time buyers?
test_input.post_content: Just launched our new AI scheduling feature!

expected_output.reply: Thanks Sophie! So glad you love it. Yes! Use code WELCOME20 for 20% off your first month. Let me know if you have questions!
